texto: How many opportunities come along? If you wait for the right one that's wrong because it may never be right and what have you got to lose? Even if it's a disaster you've tried you've learned something you've had an adventure. And that doesn't mean you can't do it again.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Edward McCabe que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “How many opportunities come along? If you wait for the right one that's wrong because it may neve…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, getting, going, com foco em going.

texto: The biggest quality in successful people I think is an impatience with negative thinking ... my feeling was even if it's as bad as I think it is we'll make it work.
